# Configuration of visual appearance of HTML and PDF output


## HTML formatting


HTML output [See Quarto documentation on [HTML themes](https://quarto.org/docs/output-formats/html-themes.html).]{.column-margin} is styled with Quarto's `cosmo` theme. The included file `custom.css` adds settings for the appearance of text in the project's custom `column-margin` class.

## PDF formatting

PDFs [See Quarto documentation on [PDF configuration](https://quarto.org/docs/output-formats/pdf-basics.html).]{.column-margin}  are rendered with the `lualatex` engine. The YAML `geometry` property defines borders and spacing of the main content areas in centimeters.

With the `include-in-header` property, the configuration injects some LaTex into the output pipeline. This code sets up the LaTex `hyperref` package to create live links from citations in the PDF file, and defines a fallback chain for fonts. The main font is set to `Georgia`, falling back to `Apple Color Emoji` for missing characters.
